# Swiggy BLCK HDFC Bank Credit Card
  * Free 3-month Swiggy BLCK membership*
  * Earn CashBack across Swiggy and select online spends*
  * Joining fee waived on spends of ₹75,000 in 90 days of card issuance*
TnCs Apply


[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=SWCC#nbb "Apply Now")
![Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/pws-extra-4326-swiggy-black-1920-x-500?fmt=webp)
What's in store for you
  * [Card Benefits & Features](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-blck-hdfc-bank-credit-card#a "Card Benefits & Features")
  * [Eligibility Criteria](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-blck-hdfc-bank-credit-card#c "Eligibility Criteria")
  * [Documents Required to Apply](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-blck-hdfc-bank-credit-card#d "Documents Required to Apply")
  * [Frequently Asked Questions](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-blck-hdfc-bank-credit-card#r "Frequently Asked Questions")
  


![](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/indianoil-card?fmt=webp-alpha)
### More rewards than ever before
Welcome Benefits
  * Complimentary Swiggy BLCK membership for 3 months as a welcome benefit.*


Swiggy Benefits
  * 10% CashBack on spends across Swiggy app transactions.*


Credit Benefits
  * 5% CashBack on select online spends.*


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-blck-hdfc-bank-credit-card#benefits "View More")
![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Additional Benefits
### CashBack Benefits
  * 10% CashBack* on Swiggy application (Food ordering, Instamart & Dineout ). For more details, [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/swiggy-blck-hdfc-bank-credit-card/pdf/10-percent-cashback-details.pdf). 
  * 5% CashBack* on online spends across select online Merchants. For the list of eligible Merchants and MCCs, [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/swiggy-blck-hdfc-bank-credit-card/pdf/5-percent-cashback-details-swiggy-black-credit-card.pdf).
  * 1% CashBack* on other categories. For more details, [click here.](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/swiggy-blck-hdfc-bank-credit-card/pdf/1-percent-cashback-details-swiggy-blck-hdfc-bank-credit-card.pdf)
  * *T&C Apply.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-blck-hdfc-bank-credit-card "View More")
![Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Mastercard Golf Benefits
  * Access to golf courses worldwide and 12 free lessons per year. 
  * Get 4 complimentary rounds of green fees per calendar year.
  * Enjoy discounted golf services at 50% of the green fee beyond complimentary sessions.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://specials.priceless.com/en-in/offers/Mastercard_World_Card_India_Golf_Program?Oid=201902180041) for more details.
  * *T&C Apply.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-blck-hdfc-bank-credit-card "View More")
![Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Banking Benefits
  * Convert high-value transactions into [SmartEMI(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/smartemi) with ease after purchase.*
  * Enjoy fast and secure Contactless Payments* for a smoother checkout experience.
  * Stay protected with fraud liability cover on unauthorised Credit Card transactions.*
  * Enjoy the flexibility of revolving credit to pay your outstanding balance over time at a nominal interest rate.* Please refer to the Fees and Charges section to know more.
*T&C Apply.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-blck-hdfc-bank-credit-card "View More")
![Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Wondering if you are eligible?
Salaried
  * **Nationality:** Indian
  * **Age:** Min 21 years & Max 60 Years 
  * **Net Monthly Income:** **>** ₹1,00,000 


Self-Employed
  * **Nationality:** Indian
  * **Age** :Min 21 years & Max 65 Years
  * **Annual ITR** > ₹12 lakh per annum 


![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Documents required to get you started
Identity Proof
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID
  * Driving licence
  * PAN card
  * Passport size photographs


Address Proof
  * Utility bills (electricity, water, gas, or telephone)
  * Rental agreement
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID


Income Proof
  * Salary slips (for salaried individuals)
  * Income Tax Returns (ITR)
  * Form 16
  * Bank statements


## Know more about the card
  1. ### Fees and Charges
  2. ### Card Details
  3. ### CashBack Redemption
  4. ### Contactless Payment
  5. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions


#  Fees and Charges 
  * **Joining Fee / Renewal Membership Fee:** ₹1,000 + Applicable Charges
  * Joining Fee of ₹1,000 will be waived on spending ₹75,000 in the first 90 days. (Applicable for first Year only).
  * **Spend** ₹2,00,000 or more in a year, before your Credit Card renewal date and get your renewal fee waived off


  * **Exclusions for Spends of ₹2,00,000** and above for eligibility of renewal year fee waiver are as follows:
    1. Cash on Call
    2. Balance Transfer
    3. Cash Withdrawal.


[Click Here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/swiggy-blck-hdfc-bank-credit-card/pdf/card-member-agreement-swiggy.pdf) for Card Member Agreement. 
![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Card Details 
Welcome Benefit
Swiggy BLCK Membership is a premium subscription program for Swiggy users. It is a single membership that offers unlimited benefits across restaurants and Instamart orders on Swiggy, including free delivery and exclusive discounts from select restaurants. To get this membership, activate your Swiggy Blck HDFC Bank Credit Card.
Card Activation is done by following one or more below mentioned ways: 
  * Making a transaction using the Credit Card
  * To use the card via OTP or IVR, setting PIN for the card, and enabling card controls such as online transactions, enabling international transactions etc. 


For more details on card activation, [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/activation-guidelines).
**Mastercard Golf Benefits**
Please follow below link to know how to redeem the benefits – 
  * **Link :** [Mastercard World Card India Golf Program | Priceless Specials(opens in a new tab)](https://specials.priceless.com/en-in/offers/Mastercard_World_Card_India_Golf_Program?Oid=201902180041)
  * **Customer Service Number:** +1800 102 6263 


**Interest-Free Credit Period**
Get up to 50 days of interest-free period on your Swiggy BLCK HDFC Bank Credit Card **Note:** The interest-free period begins only once the merchant submits the charge. 
**Zero Lost Card Liability**
In the unfortunate event that you lose your Swiggy BLCK HDFC Bank Credit Card, you will have zero liability on any fraudulent transactions, provided you report the loss immediately to our 24-hour call centre.
![Fuel Surcharge Waiver](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  CashBack Redemption 
  * Cashback earned for current billing cycle will be auto redeemed against outstanding amount due.


For more details on Finance charges please refer to the **Most Important Terms and Conditions.**
  * To earn 10% CashBack using Swiggy BLCK HDFC Bank Credit Card, the cardholder should make a minimum transaction of ₹249 using the card. 
  * To earn 5% and 1% CashBack using Swiggy BLCK HDFC Bank Credit Card, the cardholder should make a minimum transaction of ₹100 using the card.


![Contactless Payment](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Contactless Payment 
Your Swiggy BLCK HDFC Bank Credit Card is enabled for contactless payments, facilitating fast, convenient, and secure payments at retail outlets. 
(**Note:** In India, payment through contactless mode is allowed for a maximum of ₹5,000 for a single transaction where you are not asked to input your Credit Card PIN. However, if the amount is higher than or equal to ₹5,000, the Card holder has to enter the Credit Card PIN for security reasons.)
![Additional Features](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * *[The Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/co-branded-most-important-terms-and-conditions-for-credit-cards.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/swiggy-blck-hdfc-bank-credit-card/pdf/t-and-cs-swiggy-black-hdfc-bank-credit-card.pdf) for Product specific TnC
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/swiggy-blck-hdfc-bank-credit-card/pdf/combined-tncs-ornge-and-blck.pdf) for Combined TnCs


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
##  Frequently Asked Questions 
### 
What CashBack benefits are offered on the Swiggy BLCK HDFC Bank Credit Card?
You earn 10% CashBack on eligible Swiggy app spends, 5% CashBack on select online merchants and categories and 1% CashBack on all other categories, as per applicable terms and merchant eligibility.
### 
What welcome benefit do I get with the Swiggy BLCK HDFC Bank Credit Card?
You receive a complimentary 3-month Swiggy BLCK membership as a welcome benefit after activating your card.
### 
How do I activate my Swiggy BLCK HDFC Bank Credit Card to avail benefits?
You can activate your card through any of the following actions:
⦁ Make your first transaction using the Credit Card
⦁ Authenticate the card using OTP or IVR
⦁ Set the card PIN
⦁ Enable card controls such as online or international transactions
Once activated, your welcome benefits and rewards start applying. For more details on card activation, click here .
### 
How is CashBack redeemed on the Swiggy BLCK HDFC Bank Credit Card?
CashBack is automatically credited to your card account as statement credit after it is earned, subject to the CashBack cycle and applicable terms.
### 
How can I get the renewal fee waived on the Swiggy BLCK HDFC Bank Credit Card?
Spend ₹2,00,000 or more in a year before your renewal date to get your next year’s renewal fee waived.
